name: os1-linux-electron
description: OS1 Linux desktop shell built with Electron, TypeScript, React, and Vite.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && mv dist/preload/index.js dist/preload/index.cjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
